observations.format_data: bold, italic, underline and url ranges rendered in VK Web
observations.offset_probe: unicode-codepoint and UTF-16 candidates both rendered the intended emoji-adjacent bold and underline ranges; runtime emits certified Unicode codepoint offsets
observations.markdown: compiled locally; raw Markdown is rendered literally
observations.lists: Unicode bullets or numbers with indentation
observations.table: rendered locally and uploaded as one or more JPEG photos
observations.standalone_image: uploaded as a VK photo attachment
observations.mixed_content: sent as ordered text and photo messages

clients.name: VK Web
clients.version: not exposed by client UI during manual observation
